name: golia
description: Claude Code plugins published by goliajp.

plugins.name: port-registry
plugins.description: Soft, globally shared port allocator (DHCP-style) with implicit PreToolUse trigger for server-starting commands.

plugins.name: plugin-author
plugins.description: Walk users through creating a Claude Code plugin from scratch — marketplace bootstrap, plugin scaffolding, hook/skill design, portability, validate, install, and release.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Lightweight save / resume handoff. /handoff save lands the unfinished work's plan in a .claude/ plan file and writes a thin <project>/.claude/handoff.md pointer; /handoff resume follows the pointer to where the work is and how to pick up. Works out of the box.

plugins.name: pid-registry
plugins.description: Per-project handle ledger for long-running processes. PreToolUse hook auto-fires when Bash is launched with run_in_background:true and reminds Claude to record a .pid handle at <project>/.claude/pid-registry/<name>.pid.
